_meta.note: Cycle 11 Human Tester Mode. All 14 minigames, 166 templates, GroqAdapter, Anam persistence analyzed. No headless runner available (Godot native). Analysis via web-demo source files.

card_pool_summary.source: FastRoute hardcoded templates (+ GroqAdapter LLM for live generation)
card_pool_summary.biome_coverage_verdict: COMPLETE -- all 8 biomes have dedicated card sets (20 each)

faction_balance.note: Sample analysis on visible templates (~26 analyzed in detail). Full 166 estimation based on per-biome faction notes.
faction_balance.cycle7_warning: druides/niamh imbalance flagged in cycle 7 (2.12:1 ratio)
faction_balance.cycle8_correction: niamh boosted in iles_mystiques (14/20 rep options = 70%)
faction_balance.current_status: Partially improved. druides still 31% globally. ankou at 13% -- consistently lowest across all biomes.
faction_balance.verdict: MEDIUM IMBALANCE -- persistent druides dominance, ankou consistently low

LLM_cards_cap_validation.risk: HIGH -- GroqAdapter.generateCard() does not sanitize LLM effect values. Hallucinated HEAL_LIFE:50 would enter game. Engine-level scaleAndCap() provides last-resort cap but raw card data is unvalidated.
LLM_cards_cap_validation.recommendation: Add post-parse sanitization in GroqAdapter.generateCard() before returning Card

effect_caps_compliance.overall_verdict: PASS for FastRoute pool. HIGH risk for LLM-generated cards.

details: fuir: DAMAGE_LIFE:3 + ADD_REPUTATION:niamh:-5 (damage + negative rep, no positive)
combattre: ADD_REPUTATION:ankou:5 + DAMAGE_LIFE:3 (damage as only immediate outcome)
unfair_cards_check.verdict: PASS -- minimal purely negative options. No card traps player into 3 bad options.

runs.verdict: TOO EASY -- cautious player gains more life than they lose. Drain -1/card offset by avg +4.7 heal per card.
APPROPRIATE -- aggressive play with consistent minigame failure leads to death around card 15-20
GOOD -- tension builds in final 5 cards. Appropriate challenge with ogham mitigation.

simulated_run_outcomes.balance_verdict: MEDIUM: cautious play is too safe (life never threatened). Need progressive pressure after card 15.

minigame_audit.verb_distribution_concern: esprit verbs (parler/mediter/apaiser/se concentrer) over-represented -- player frequently triggers apaisement/volonte/sang_froid. Chance verbs under-represented.
minigame_audit.verdict: PASS -- all wired. Verb distribution creates esprit minigame bias.

groq_adapter_integration.finding_HIGH: LLM effect values unvalidated on parse -- T036
groq_adapter_integration.loading_ux_gap_MEDIUM: 8s generation with no UI feedback -- T037
groq_adapter_integration.verdict: FUNCTIONAL but HIGH risk from unvalidated LLM effects

new_tasks_recommended.title: Validate LLM card effect caps in GroqAdapter post-parse
LLM loading UX -- spinner during 8s Groq generation
Difficulty scaling -- progressive drain after card 15
Faction rebalance guidance -- druides cap 15%, ankou target 20%

action_items: HIGH T036: Add GroqAdapter post-parse effect cap sanitization
MEDIUM T037: Add LLM loading indicator (8s gap)
MEDIUM: druides faction over-represented -- guide future content
MEDIUM: cautious player too safe -- consider difficulty scaling
LOW T039: Faction balance in future card batches
